quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive resort site (packages, gallery, FAQ, contact/booking), mobile-friendly, Netlify hosting setup

sources.notes: Category: Hotel resort. Tagline: luxury staycation with Laguna lake view. Superhost on Airbnb. HD assets from Facebook Photos — hero 2048×1536, gallery pool shots up to 2048×1536 / 1536×2048, logo 480×480.
